Hero.tagline:
I make sure your backend system is reliable and scalable.
I focus on delivering the application reliably and keeping the service robust.

Contact.description: You can get in touch to collaborate on backend systems, API services, or new opportunities.

items.text: First understand the problem, then write the solution.
items.author: John Johnson

items.text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
items.author: Martin Fowler

items.text: Simplicity is the foundation of good architecture.
items.author: Unknown

items.text: Make it work, make it right, then make it fast.
items.author: Kent Beck

items.text: Making code understandable is more important than simply writing good code.
items.author: Unknown

items.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
items.author: Linus Torvalds

items.text: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
items.author: Harold Abelson

items.text: Adding complexity is easy. Keeping it simple is the real skill.
items.author: Unknown

items.text: A good program makes complex things simple.
items.author: Grady Booch

items.text: Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.
items.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery

items.text: Code is written once but read hundreds of times.
items.author: Unknown

items.text: Good architecture accounts not only for today’s requirements, but for tomorrow’s changes.
items.author: Unknown

items.text: The best optimization is to remove unnecessary complexity first.
items.author: Unknown

items.text: Code shouldn’t just work — it should be easy to maintain.
items.author: Unknown

items.text: A professional developer doesn’t write code, they create solutions to problems.
items.author: Unknown
